rule_metadata.name: tsh
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'tsh' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule tsh
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'tsh' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "tsh"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = "/bin/tshd"
		$string2 = "/tmp/tshd"
		$string3 = "creaktive/tsh"
		$string4 = /devine\@cr0\.net/
		$string5 = /tsh_runshell\(/

	condition:
		any of them
}
